title: Dave Reports Record Third Quarter 2024 Results and Raises Full Year 2024 Guidance
text:
Dave Inc. (Nasdaq: DAVE) delivered strong third-quarter performance with record revenues of $92.5 million, representing 41% year-over-year growth. This marks the fourth consecutive quarter of accelerating revenue growth.

Q3 2024 Highlights:
- Net income reached $0.5 million, up $12.5 million year-over-year
- Adjusted EBITDA increased $27.2 million to $24.7 million
- Variable profit margin expanded nearly 1,300 basis points to 69%
- Monthly transacting members grew 23% to 2.4 million
- Customer acquisition costs decreased 14% to $15

Operational Performance: ExtraCash originations surged 46% to $1.4 billion while credit quality improved, with the 28-day delinquency rate declining 64 basis points to 1.78%. Dave Debit Card spending increased 19% to $407 million.

CEO Jason Wilk noted the company delivered another record quarter of variable margin driven by strong credit performance and operational discipline.

Updated 2024 Guidance:
- Revenue: $340-$343 million (previously $310-$325 million)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $71-$74 million (previously $40-$50 million)

Strategic Development: The company announced entering a non-binding letter of intent with a prominent fintech sponsor bank to diversify banking relationships and support future product expansion.
